markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize kickoff logistics and content workflow for the GrowthX partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Kickoff Scheduled:** The kickoff is set for Mon, Nov 17 at 8:30 AM PT. Product deep-dives with PMMs (Nikita, Marie) will follow to capture product nuance.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**Content Workflow Defined:** GrowthX drafts content in Google Docs → Navan (Rich/Libby) approves → Navan sends to Legal/IR for final review.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Review Bottleneck Mitigated:** The new Legal/IR review process is not a blocker. General SEO content (not making product claims) requires minimal review, enabling the target volume of 3–4 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [**Tracking Strategy:** A dedicated URL structure (e.g., subdirectory) will be created to isolate and track the performance of GrowthX-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow & Approvals

  - [**GrowthX Process:** Drafts in Google Docs; Navan handles staging/publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [**Navan's New Approval Process:** All content now requires review from Legal and Investor Relations (IR) via email aliases.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [**Resolution:** This is not a blocker for the target volume of 3–4 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Rationale:** General SEO content (not making product claims) requires minimal review from Legal/IR.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [**Workflow:** GrowthX drafts → Rich/Libby approve → Navan sends to Legal/IR for final review.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)

### Content Strategy & Tracking

  - [**Goal:** Isolate the performance of GrowthX content for clear impact tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Method:** Create a dedicated URL structure, such as a subdirectory on the main blog.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Action:** Nima will consult the web team on implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**SEO Collaboration:** Moran (Navan SEO) will advise on keyword strategy and cross-linking.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### Kickoff & Onboarding

  - [**Kickoff Call:**](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
      - [**Date/Time:** Mon, Nov 17 @ 8:30 AM PT (45–60 min)](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [**Attendees:** Nima, Rich, Libby, Moran (optional)](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Product Deep-Dives:**](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Capture product nuance from experts not found in documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [**Travel Product:** 30-min call with Nikita (PMM) scheduled for Thu, Nov 20 @ 10:00 AM PT.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
      - [**Expense Product:** A separate call will be scheduled with Marie (PMM) before her maternity leave (starts \~Nov 28).](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [**Resource Sharing:**](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
      - [**Owner:** Rich will provide brand guidelines and the product playbook.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
      - [**Owner:** Nima will provide cue cards.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [**Recipient:** `team@growthxlabs.com`](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

      - [Consult the web team on creating a dedicated URL structure.](https://fathom.video/share/JK6v8xwc3EBVRyUCMgn1sKN_oHLqH5yE?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
